zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Davy於1432年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伊斯頓時，他的父親Henry Davy Ryxe26歲，母親Margerie22歲。他於大約1457年與Elizabeth Fiske在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年9月14日在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Davy于1432年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可伊斯頓时，他的父亲Henry Davy Ryxe26岁，母亲Margerie22岁。他于大约1457年与Elizabeth Fiske在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年9月14日在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛可利享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可布洛可利聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Davy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Sligo): adopted name for Mac Daibhéid ‘son of David’, see McDevitt .
French and Breton: from a vernacular form of the personal name   David  .

variants.name: Davey
meanings: English: from the personal name Davy, originally an Old French vernacular form of the Biblical name David which became the most common form of the name in medieval England.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Davy was born in 1432, in Easton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Davy Ryxe, was 26 and his mother, Margerie, was 22. He married Elizabeth Fiske about 1457, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 14 September 1485, in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1485, à Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Davy(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Davy Ryxe(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margerie(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국에서 Elizabeth Fiske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 9월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브록리 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Davy родился в 1432 г. в местности эастон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Davy Ryxe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margerie, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fiske около 1457 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 сентября 1485 г. в местности броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
